title: JDi Client
description: JDi Client is a rather performant Modpack meant as a Client for Servers, but works well in Singleplayer as well.
body:
# About JDi Client is a rather performant Modpack meant as a Client for Servers, but works well in Singleplayer as well. The focus of this Modpack is mostly Optimization and Usability,
Here's a list of notable features: - LOTS of Optimization Mods - Fully Revamped Chat (you will probably want to Configure [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/MOqt4Z5n)) - A LOT of added Sounds for Items, Walking, and Ambiance. (and Sound Physics) - Highly Optimized Chunk Loading For Servers ([C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/VSNURh3q) and [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/M08ruV16)) - Easily Build things in Singleplayer and copy them to Servers. ([Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/N6n5dqoA) and [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/bEpr0Arc)) - Create Books with Colors and Formatting ([Scribble](https://modrinth.com/mod/yXAvIk0x)) - Join most Servers regardless of Version ([ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/rIC2XJV4)) - Talk with other Players with Voice Chat ([Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/9eGKb6K1), Mod/Plugin must be installed on the Server) - Host LAN Worlds publicly to play with your Friends ([e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/qANg5Jrr)) - And a LOT of other Tweaks. This is my Personal Client Modpack, so this will probably be updated over time.
Mod List ## Included Mods - [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/zV5r3pPn) by tr7zw - [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/fM515JnW) by CreativeMD - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV) by squeek502 - [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/lhGA9TYQ) by shedaniel - [AttributeFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/lOOpEntO) by Darkhax - [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/N6n5dqoA) by Moulberry - [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/g96Z4WVZ) by Thosea - [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/MBAkmtvl) by BlayTheNinth - [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/kqJFAPU9) by Lortseam - [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/n6PXGAoM) by TheCSDev - [Better Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/OSMu7zRz) by Fy17 - [Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/NK39zBp2) by Motschen, amiralimollaei, tterrag1098, Pyrofab, backryun, byquanton - [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/M08ruV16) by johni0702 - [CICADA](https://modrinth.com/mod/IwCkru1D) by enjarai - [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/89Wsn8GD) by Cael - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/Wb5oqrBJ) by dzwdz, Fourmisain - [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/MOqt4Z5n) by OBro1961 -
